invalidation: Narrative score drops below 0.45 or evidence freshness cannot be verified.

evidence: CMC-style market breadth shifted positive across large-cap BNB ecosystem assets.

executionGuards: Do not execute unless the token appears in the BNB Hack eligible token universe.
